title: Linear write op — performed by the conductor from the main loop ONLY (subagent writes silently no-op)
description: Every Linear mutation the conductor makes is shaped by this. Idempotent: find-before-create keyed off the identity fields (mirrors app/client.ts dedupe).

op.description: create_* in to-slices publish mode (post-approval); set_status/tick_ac/update_body/comment/set_done by the conductor from implementer/reviewer evidence. update_body keeps the issue DESCRIPTION current each transition (body-over-comments — the at-a-glance state); comment is reserved for durable findings/escalation, not a mechanical status trail.

key.description: find-before-create key: parent=campaign slug · child=slice id · edge=<from>-><to> · ac=ac checksum · comment=marker tag

issue_id.description: target Linear issue id (null when creating)

ac_checksum.description: sha of the AC text — detects AC drift on re-run

body.description: the comment body (op=comment) OR the new issue description (op=update_body); redacted of the project's secrets/PII per its rules

comment_marker.description: stable tag making the comment idempotent (update-in-place, not duplicate)
